name: Shrimp on Crab Legs (Cang Cua Boc Tom)
recipeIngredient: 10 Crab legs or several hard shell crabs
1/2 Fresh hot red chili pepper -or- 2 dried
recipeInstructions:
1. If crab claws are available in fish stores, use them as a handle and edible part. Otherwise, boil hard shell crabs and remove the claws.
2. Reserve crab bodies for other dishes.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F.
4. Pour oil into a bowl and mix with shrimp paste.
5. Form an oval of shrimp paste around and halfway down the crab claw.
6. Place claws on a baking sheet and bake for 30 minutes.
7. Serve with Nuoc Cham and watercress.
NOTE: In Vietnam, this dish is often barbecued over charcoal. Cook for 10 minutes on each side if desired. Makes 10 servings.
